summary: Casos/Incidencias module testing completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend Admin: Working correctly with stats, filters, case list, detail dialog. Frontend Resident: CRITICAL ISSUE - Casos tab NOT integrated into ResidentHome.jsx (the actual component being used). The main agent added Casos to ResidentUI.js but the app uses ResidentHome.jsx from features/resident folder.

integration_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Casos tab not integrated into ResidentHome.jsx. The main agent added CasosResident component to ResidentUI.js but the app actually uses ResidentHome.jsx from /app/frontend/src/features/resident/. The TAB_ORDER in ResidentHome.jsx is ['emergency', 'visits', 'reservations', 'directory', 'profile'] - missing 'casos'. ResidentLayout.jsx RESIDENT_NAV_ITEMS also doesn't include casos.

action_items: CRITICAL: Add Casos tab to ResidentHome.jsx - import CasosResident component and add 'casos' to TAB_ORDER array
CRITICAL: Add Casos nav item to ResidentLayout.jsx RESIDENT_NAV_ITEMS array with ClipboardList icon
Add Casos module container in ResidentHome.jsx similar to other modules (visits, reservations, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: ResidentUI.js file exists but is NOT being used - the app routes to ResidentHome.jsx from features/resident folder
The Casos integration was added to the wrong file (ResidentUI.js instead of ResidentHome.jsx)
Backend implementation is complete and working correctly

success_rate.frontend_admin: 100% - Stats, filters, case list, detail dialog all working

seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed cases created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Casos module fully working. Admin UI at /admin/casos working. Resident UI needs Casos tab integration into ResidentHome.jsx and ResidentLayout.jsx. The CasosResident.jsx component exists but is not imported/used in the actual resident home component.
